Compliance.description: Imperial Logistics subsidiary; POPIA privacy policy; CPA-compliant warranties; no regulatory issues found.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 3.16/5 (177 reviews, NPS 38); mixed recent 2025/2026 reviews; some positive exceptional service, many complaints.

Product Value.description: Certified pre-owned with 12-mo warranty; service history; 170+ branches; competitive pricing for certified stock.

Innovation.description: Online booking/listings, finance applications; no app found; basic digital presence.

Customer Support.description: HelloPeter NPS 38, avg 3.16; mixed: some excellent service praised, many complaints on support, logistics, dishonesty.

Accessibility & Security.description: POPIA-compliant, national 170+ branches, website access; no app or security incidents noted.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Certified used cars various price points; financing from R2,500/mo; no fixed list

socialSentiment.summary: Mixed HelloPeter NPS 38; positive on quality/warranty when good; negative on poor staff attitudes, logistics.
